AU.note: Official NRL channel — extended match highlights, round recaps and try compilations within hours of each game.
Nine Network's NRL channel — free-to-air rights-holder; additional highlights, post-match analysis and pressers.
Official AFL channel — full match highlights posted hours after games.
Official A-Leagues channel — match highlights, final-15 recaps and feature content for A-League Men & Women.
Official Super Rugby Pacific channel — match highlights, top tries and post-match content for all club games.
Official Wallabies channel — Test match highlights and pressers when Tests are played; quieter mid-season.
Cricket Australia's cricket.com.au channel — official highlights for men's and women's Australia international and domestic cricket.
Official BBL/WBBL channel — match highlights and big moments for both leagues.
Official AO channel — daily highlight reels, full-match replays and interviews during the tournament; year-round content.
Official ATP Tour channel — per-match highlights for ATP tournaments worldwide, posted same day.
Official WTA channel — per-match highlights for women's tour events, posted same day.
ATP-affiliated subscription service; posts free same-day match highlights alongside its paid offering.
Official Supercars channel — race highlights, qualifying recaps and onboards within a day of each round.
Official Premier League channel viewable to AU audiences. Stan Sport holds AU rights but paywalls full highlights; this channel is the cleanest free YouTube source.
Stan Sport — AU EPL rights-holder. Posts clip-form coverage and 'Added Time' content; full match highlights are paywalled.
SBS Sport — Australian rights-holder for the FIFA World Cup. Posts per-match highlights for both Men's and Women's World Cup matches within hours of full-time.

UK.note: Official Premier League channel — goal compilations, classic moments and feature content.
UK PL rights-holder — highlights, key moments and interviews from PL, WSL, EFL and SPFL games.
Official Emirates FA Cup channel — round-by-round highlights and key moments.
Official EFL channel — play-off finals, marquee full-90 replays and match highlights across Championship, League One/Two and Carabao Cup.
Official UEFA channel — UCL goal compilations and per-team highlight reels. Per-match full highlights are paywalled at UEFA.tv / broadcasters.
UK UCL rights-holder — clips, key moments and interviews from UCL/UEL games.
Official Guinness Men's Six Nations channel — full match highlights and Super Saturday recaps during the championship (Feb-Mar).
Official Wimbledon channel — daily highlights, full-match replays from past editions, player interviews.
Official ECB channel — Test, T20I and ODI highlights for England men and women, plus Vitality Blast and county content.
Official The Hundred channel — match highlights, top moments and athlete content; also streams matches live during the tournament window.
Official Formula 1 channel — race highlights, qualifying, sprint and post-race driver reactions, posted within hours of each GP.

US.note: Official NBA channel — full game recaps, top plays and player highlights uploaded within hours of every game.
Official NFL channel — every game recap, player highlights and Top 100 series; posts game highlights same day.
Official MLB channel — full game highlights for every game posted same-night, plus walk-offs and player compilations.
Official NHL channel — game recaps, top moments and draft coverage.
Official MLS channel — match highlights, MLS Cup content and feature stories. Some MLS Season Pass content is exclusive to Apple TV.
Official NCAA channel — full replays of CWS, bowl games and tournament play; broadest cross-sport NCAA highlights source.
Broadcaster channel — posts CFB game highlights during the season (off-season skews to podcast/analysis content).
Official March Madness channel — tournament highlights and game recaps for men's and women's NCAA basketball tournaments.
Official US Open Tennis channel — daily highlights, condensed/iconic replays and player interviews during the tournament.

IE.note: Official GAA channel — bitesize match highlights for All-Ireland Senior Football and Hurling Championships posted within days of each round.
Official Guinness Men's Six Nations channel — covers Ireland matches during the championship.
Official Premier League channel. IE rights are Sky/Premier Sports; no Ireland-specific YouTube rights-holder, so the official PL channel is the canonical free source.

NZ.note: Official All Blacks channel — Test match highlights, Maori All Blacks, Junior World Champs and analysis.
Official Super Rugby Pacific channel — covers the five NZ franchises (Blues, Chiefs, Hurricanes, Crusaders, Highlanders) plus the Aupiki women's comp.
Official NRL channel — covers NZ Warriors and all NRL matches.
Official New Zealand Cricket channel — Test, ODI and T20I highlights for both Black Caps and White Ferns.

ZA.note: BOKTube — the official SA Rugby YouTube channel; Test match highlights, 'Journey to Greatness' series and pressers; active multiple times per week.

Cricket South Africa channel — pressers, training content, CSA Awards and feature pieces. Full match highlights are restricted by SuperSport broadcast rights and rarely appear on YouTube; best official option but inconsistent for match highlights specifically.
